name: python-fastapi-development
description: Python FastAPI backend development with async patterns, SQLAlchemy, Pydantic, authentication, and production API patterns.
capabilities: Scaffold new FastAPI projects with proper structure
Set up SQLAlchemy ORM with PostgreSQL database
Create RESTful API endpoints with CRUD operations
Configure error handling and logging patterns
Build testable FastAPI applications with pytest
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Security audit completed. All static findings are false positives. The 'external_commands' flagged lines are skill references (@skill-name) not shell executions. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' flags are markdown references, not code. This is a legitimate FastAPI development workflow documentation file with no actual security risks.
valueStatement: This skill provides a comprehensive workflow for building production-ready Python FastAPI backends with database integration, authentication, testing, and deployment patterns.
limitations: Does not execute code - provides guidance and prompts only
Requires other specialized skills for full workflow
Does not provision actual cloud infrastructure

useCases.title: New FastAPI Project Setup
useCases.description: Quickly scaffold a new FastAPI project with proper structure, logging, and environment configuration.

useCases.title: Database Integration
useCases.description: Set up SQLAlchemy models, migrations, and database connections for production applications.

useCases.title: Complete API Development
useCases.description: Follow a structured 8-phase workflow from project setup to deployment.

promptTemplates.title: Start New FastAPI Project
promptTemplates.prompt: Use @python-fastapi-development to scaffold a new FastAPI project with SQLAlchemy and JWT authentication.
promptTemplates.scenario: Beginning a new FastAPI backend project

promptTemplates.title: Add Database Models
promptTemplates.prompt: Use @python-fastapi-development to set up SQLAlchemy models for a user authentication system with PostgreSQL.
promptTemplates.scenario: Adding database layer to existing project

promptTemplates.title: Create API Endpoints
promptTemplates.prompt: Use @python-fastapi-development to create RESTful API endpoints with CRUD operations for a items resource.
promptTemplates.scenario: Building API routes for resource management

promptTemplates.title: Full Stack FastAPI App
promptTemplates.prompt: Use @python-fastapi-development to build a complete FastAPI application with authentication, database, testing, and Docker deployment.

bestPractices: Use async patterns with SQLAlchemy 2.0 for better performance
Always validate input with Pydantic models
Implement proper error handling with custom exceptions
antiPatterns: Do not skip type hints - they improve code maintainability
Do not use synchronous database calls in async endpoints
Do not store secrets in code - use environment variables

faq.question: What version of FastAPI does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports FastAPI with Python 3.11+ and is compatible with SQLAlchemy 2.0 and Pydantic v2.

faq.question: Does this skill write code for me?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides workflow guidance and prompts to invoke other specialized skills that generate code.

faq.question: Can I use this skill with other databases?
faq.answer: Yes. The workflow is designed for PostgreSQL but can be adapted for other databases supported by SQLAlchemy.

faq.question: What authentication methods are covered?
faq.answer: The workflow covers JWT authentication and OAuth2 implementation patterns.

faq.question: Is Docker deployment included?
faq.answer: Yes. Phase 8 covers Dockerfile creation, docker-compose setup, and cloud deployment patterns.

faq.question: Can Claude Code use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill is compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code tools.
